ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host of the property */,
  "neighbourhood_group" TEXT /* Group of neighborhoods the property belongs to */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Specific neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., Entire home/apt, Private room) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price per night */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for a booking */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Number of days the property is available for booking in a year */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "property_size" INTEGER /* Size of the property in square feet or square meters */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, villa) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last property inspection */,
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `neighbourhoods` table for more structured neighborhood data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighbourhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood_id") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "host_since" TEXT /* Date when the host started hosting */,
  "host_location" TEXT /* Location of the host */,
  "host_verifications" TEXT /* Verification methods used by the host */,
  "host_response_time" TEXT /* Response time of the host for inquiries */,
  "host_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the host */,
  "host_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the host's profile picture */,
  "host_total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings the host has */,
  "host_response_rate" REAL /* Percentage of inquiries responded to by the host */,
  "host_identity_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the host's identity is verified */,
  "host_language" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the reservation */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the reservation */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the reservation */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the reservation */,
  "number_of_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests included in the reservation */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the reservation */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Cancellation policy for the reservation */,
  "guest_special_requests" TEXT /* Any special requests made by the guest */,
  "reservation_source" TEXT /* Source of the reservation (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the reservation */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest */,
  "guest_email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "guest_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "guest_since" TEXT /* Date when the guest registered on the platform */,
  "guest_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the guest's profile picture */,
  "guest_total_reservations" INTEGER /* Total number of reservations made by the guest */,
  "guest_favorites" TEXT /* List of favorite properties or neighborhoods */,
  "guest_preferences" TEXT /* Guest's preferences (e.g., non-smoking, pets allowed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the guest (1 to 5) */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., platform, third-party) */,
  "review_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "review_response" TEXT /* Response from the host to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_picture" TEXT /* URL to a picture of the neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of properties in the neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the analytics data */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the property from reviews */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the property */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate as a percentage */,
  "revenue_last_year" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the property in the last year */,
  "total_reservations_last_year" INTEGER /* Total number of reservations in the last year */,
  "average_stay_duration" REAL /* Average duration of stays in days */,
  "peak_season" TEXT /* Peak season for the property (e.g., summer, winter) */,
  "low_season" TEXT /* Low season for the property */,
  "revenue_monthly" TEXT /* Monthly revenue breakdown */,
  "occupancy_by_month" TEXT /* Occupancy rate by month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the price change record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property whose price is changing */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "old_price" INTEGER /* Previous price before change */,
  "new_price" INTEGER /* New price set for the property */,
  "price_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change (e.g., seasonality, demand) */,
  "price_change_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price change becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., owner, manager, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the role (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "user_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_total_properties" INTEGER /* Total number of properties managed by the user */,
  "user_total_reservations_handled" INTEGER /* Total number of reservations handled by the user */,
  "user_language" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new review, reservation request) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property related to the message */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest sending the message */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host receiving the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the message was sent */,
  "message_status" TEXT /* Status of the message (e.g., sent, received, read) */,
  "message_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the message (e.g., to host, from guest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)
